summary: Classified the five live PR inventory refs independently as requested. #80985 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation marked that PR as security-sensitive; the remaining four PRs are independent active work with no safe close, merge, or fix action in this plan-mode inventory shard.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive PRs are out of scope for ProjectClownfish backlog automation and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling without close, merge, label, comment, or fix action.
Independent active PR; failing type check and session-state risk mean it should remain open for author/maintainer follow-up, not be closed or merged by Clownfish.
Independent active PR with failed proof/checks; it should remain open for proof and repair rather than receiving a closure action.
Independent maintainer-owned draft PR; draft/assigned maintainer work should be left open for maintainer-controlled finalization.
Independent maintainer-owned draft PR; draft/assigned maintainer work should be left open for maintainer-controlled finalization.
